title: cyathea praeceps
intro: Cyathea praeceps, also known as the Rough Tree Fern, is a species of fern that is native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyathea praeceps include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cyathea praeceps can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical ointments, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
